data.value: Close the Leveret repair arc so the overseer lands live Plot intent end-to-end, then stand up the Leveret warden (warren-d0ed) so auditor findings flow into a standing conversation that triages and proposes plans through the proven send-off\u2192planner chain.

value: SUPERSEDES the earlier 'warden is out of scope' line — the warden is now IN scope, but only a thin first slice: a single standing conversation + weekly digest + plan proposals. Auditor-autonomy-promotion recommendations from tastewatch's precision table are deferred to a follow-up.
Building any new dispatch or ingestion path for the warden — it must reuse the existing POST /conversations/:id/messages steering channel (202 today)
The warden slice is gated on the repair arc: live intent (warren-ce65/df1b) and send-off→planner (warren-157a) must work before warden findings can produce plans
The warden ingests auditor findings only via the existing POST /conversations/:id/messages channel — no new endpoint or dispatch primitive
The warden runs as a standing conversation bound to a long-lived meta-Plot, not a per-finding conversation
A standing Leveret conversation bound to a meta-Plot ingests auditor findings via POST /conversations/:id/messages and synthesizes a weekly digest
The warden proposes at least one plan through the existing send-off→planner chain (no new dispatch path), exercising the repair-arc loop on real audit input
warren-d0ed is closed (thin slice), with auditor-autonomy-promotion recommendations filed as a tracked follow-up seed
